---
title: Project Management App
description: A modern project management application built to manage workspaces, tasks, and team collaborations.
version: 0.1.0
framework: Next.js 16 (App Router)
---

# Project Management App

## Description
A modern project management application built to manage workspaces, tasks, and team collaborations. It includes features like task automation, drag-and-drop task organization, dashboards with charts, and real-time updates.

## Tech Stack
- **Framework**: Next.js 16.2.9 (App Router)
- **Library**: React 19.2.4
- **Database / Backend**: Firebase 12.15.0 (Firestore, Authentication, Hosting, etc.)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS v4, Lucide React (Icons), `next-themes` (Dark Mode)
- **UI Components**: Shadcn UI, Radix UI, Base UI
- **Data Visualization**: Chart.js (`react-chartjs-2`), Recharts
- **Drag & Drop**: `@hello-pangea/dnd`

## Structure
- `/src/app` - Next.js App Router pages and layouts.
- `/src/lib` - Firebase configurations, helper functions, and data models (e.g., `automation.ts`, `task.ts`, `firebase.ts`).
- `/src/components` - Reusable UI components.

## Guidelines
- This project uses standard Next.js App Router conventions.
- Firebase handles backend functionality (Auth and Firestore).
- Styles are handled through standard Tailwind v4 utility classes.
